visual_identity.construction: A terminal-built illustration made from large, deliberate ASCII symbols and monospaced marks
visual_identity.safe_area: Keep the complete focal metaphor inside the central 70 percent of the 1600 by 900 canvas
visual_identity.composition: one large visual metaphor, generous negative space, no decorative keyword collage
visual_identity.surface: subtle scanlines and light terminal texture

negative: no labels or fake interface copy
no photorealistic people or stock imagery

news.distortion: minimal; a tiny magenta signal may be used

posts.distortion: minimal; magenta must be very sparse

conspiracy-corner.distortion: slightly stronger but restrained terminal distortion

external_adapter.command_contract: Command is split without a shell. Use {prompt_file}, {output}, {width}, {height}, {provider}, and {model} placeholders.
